confidence_rationale: Video quality and angles make precise measurement of suture deviation difficult. Task completion and major technique elements are clearly visible, but penalty assessment is limited by viewing angle.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation from marks due to camera angle and resolution
Final knot security assessment - video ends at knot push completion
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with excellent time management and smooth technique progression. All major phases executed efficiently with minimal penalties.
strengths: Excellent time management - 80 seconds well within expert range
Good laparoscopic visualization and needle control
improvement_suggestions: Minor refinement in needle placement accuracy could eliminate small deviation penalties
